context.role: Player character jumping state to avoid ground obstacles
context.screen_position: x=100px (fixed), y=0 to -90px (parabolic arc, max jump height ~90px above ground)
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when player presses Space/Tap, during entire jump arc until landing

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex with both feet off ground, legs tucked or extended in jump pose

animation.description: Single static frame showing T-Rex in mid-air jump pose

visual_specification.details: Both feet clearly off ground, body slightly tilted forward, tail extended, eyes open

relationships.shared_with: Same body shape and size as player_run and player_dead
relationships.differences_from: player_run has feet on ground with running motion, player_duck has lowered body (118x60px), player_dead has closed/X eyes

explicit_negations: no motion blur or jump trails
no environmental effects like wind or clouds
